description: One metric on a card surface: a micro-label, the number, an optional delta pill and a sub-line.

label.description: Short uppercase microlabel, two words at most.

value.description: Preformatted, e.g. "1,284" or "99.9%". StatCard never formats.

tone.description: What state the number IS in right now, as against how it moved. Badge's vocabulary.

delta.description: How the number moved. Absent renders no pill.

sub.description: Small muted line under the value — context, e.g. "vs last week".

icon.description: A small glyph beside the label, drawn muted. Arena renders the aria-hidden wrapper; the consumer supplies the glyph.
